tooltip.cybercultivator.atmospheric_cond: Auto-condenses purified water; auto-injects purity to incubator below
tooltip.cybercultivator.bio_incubator: Insert seeds, then inject purified water/nutrients/data signal to cultivate
tooltip.cybercultivator.bio_pulse_belt: Auto-injects nutrients/purified water/data signal to nearby incubators
tooltip.cybercultivator.gene_splicer: Insert two gene seeds to splice automatically, then wait 5 seconds; sneak to retrieve input or output
tooltip.cybercultivator.life_support_pac: Mitigates serum side effects; auto-heals at low HP
tooltip.cybercultivator.seed_genes_hidde: Wear Spectrum Monocle to analyze genes
tooltip.cybercultivator.serum_bottler: Processes Synaptic Neural Berry into advanced serums; hopper compatible
tooltip.cybercultivator.spectrum_monocle: Wear to analyze seed genes, generation, synergy, and mutations
advancement.cybercultivator.root.title: Cyber-Cultivator
advancement.cybercultivator.root.descrip: Welcome to the world of cyber agriculture
advancement.cybercultivator.rare_earth.d: Obtain Rare Earth Dust, core material for precision machines
advancement.cybercultivator.bio_cultivat: Obtain Biochemical Solution to begin cultivation
advancement.cybercultivator.gene_code.de: Create new seeds through the Gene Splicer
advancement.cybercultivator.serum_path.d: Craft your first Synaptic Overclock Serum
jei.cybercultivator.incubator.bottle_byp: Returns a glass bottle after purified water injection
jei.cybercultivator.splicer.average: Child mean S%s Y%s P%s · Normal variance ±%s
jei.cybercultivator.bottler.activity_cal: Activity calculated from three material qualities
jei.cybercultivator.bottler.activity_inh: Inherits berry Activity and mutation data
jei.cybercultivator.condenser.tooltip: Production can be paused and downstream injection disabled; hopper extraction is supported
jei.cybercultivator.info.s01: S-01 Synaptic Overclock Serum: Recipe = Berry + Biochemical Solution + Glass Bottle. Effects: Atk Speed + Strength (scaled by Activity), 25s duration. Side effect: Wither + Hunger. Stackable (max VIII), Activity ≥8 starts at level II.
jei.cybercultivator.info.s02: S-02 Visual Enhancement Serum: Recipe = Berry + Rare Earth Dust + Glass Bottle. Effects: Night Vision + Detect nearby players and mobs (16-48 range) + Fire Resistance, 30s duration. Side effect: Blindness + Hunger. Stackable (max VIII), Activity ≥8 starts at level II.
jei.cybercultivator.info.s03: S-03 Metabolic Boost Serum: Recipe = Berry + Industrial Ethanol + Glass Bottle. Effects: Regen + Speed + Jump Boost, 15s duration. Side effect: Slowness + Poison. Stackable (max VIII), Activity ≥8 starts at level II.
jei.cybercultivator.info.monocle: Spectrum Monocle: Wear to reveal seed genes, generation, synergy, and mutations in item tooltips. Crafted with iron nuggets, a glass pane, silicon shards, and rare earth dust.
jei.cybercultivator.info.belt: Bio-Pulse Belt: Automatically scans nearby incubators and injects nutrients, purified water, and data signal from your inventory. Obtain: Abandoned Mineshaft, Stronghold, Big Underwater Ruin (20% chance).
jei.cybercultivator.info.pack: Life Support Pack: Accelerates serum side effect (Neural Overload) recovery. Auto-heals at low HP (60s cooldown). Obtain: Abandoned Mineshaft, Dungeon, Pillager Outpost (20% chance).
jei.cybercultivator.info.seeds.fiber: Fiber Reed Seeds: Obtain by breaking grass. Place in Bio-Incubator to cultivate, produces Plant Fiber. Use Gene Splicer to modify gene values (Speed, Yield, Potency).
jei.cybercultivator.info.seeds.soy: Protein Soy Seeds: Obtain from dungeon or village loot chests. Place in Bio-Incubator to cultivate, produces Biochemical Solution. Use Gene Splicer to modify gene values.
jei.cybercultivator.info.seeds.bloom: Alcohol Bloom Seeds: Obtain from dungeon or village loot chests. Place in Bio-Incubator to cultivate, produces Industrial Ethanol. Use Gene Splicer to modify gene values.
jei.cybercultivator.info.raw_silicon_cry: Raw Silicon Crystal: Dropped by Silicon Ore. Smelt or blast it into a Silicon Shard.
jei.cybercultivator.info.raw_rare_earth: Raw Rare Earth: Dropped by Rare Earth Ore. Smelt or blast it into Rare Earth Dust.
jei.cybercultivator.info.silicon_shard: Silicon Shard: Refined from Raw Silicon Crystal. Used as a base material for crafting data signal injectors.
jei.cybercultivator.info.rare_earth_dust: Rare Earth Dust: Refined from Raw Rare Earth. Used to craft S-02 Visual Enhancement Serum.
jei.cybercultivator.info.plant_fiber: Plant Fiber: Cultivated from Fiber Reed in Bio-Incubator. Quality (Potency) inherited from seed genes, affects serum Activity. Used to craft Synaptic Neural Berry.
jei.cybercultivator.info.biochemical_sol: Biochemical Solution: Cultivated from Protein Soy in Bio-Incubator. Quality (Concentration) inherited from seed genes, affects serum Activity. Used to craft Synaptic Neural Berry and S-01 Serum.
jei.cybercultivator.info.industrial_etha: Industrial Ethanol: Cultivated from Alcohol Bloom in Bio-Incubator. Quality (Purity) inherited from seed genes, affects serum Activity. Used to craft Synaptic Neural Berry and S-03 Serum.
jei.cybercultivator.info.purified_water: Purified Water Bottle: Auto-produced by Atmospheric Condenser (1 per 30s). Inject into incubator to increase Purity. Condenser above incubator auto-injects.
jei.cybercultivator.info.neural_berry: Synaptic Neural Berry: Core serum intermediate. Recipe: Plant Fiber + Industrial Ethanol + Biochemical Solution. Activity = Potency×0.25 + Purity×0.375 + Concentration×0.375. Higher Activity = stronger serum effects. Used to craft S-01/S-02/S-03.
jei.cybercultivator.info.bio_incubator: Bio-Incubator: Insert gene seeds, then inject purified water (Purity), biochemical solution (Nutrition), silicon shards (Data Signal) to cultivate. All three values affect crop output quality.
jei.cybercultivator.info.gene_splicer: Gene Splicer: Insert two gene seeds to start automatically, then wait 5 seconds. Child genes = (Parent A + Parent B)/2 ± random mutation. Same-type splicing: 5% mutation. Cross-type: 9% mutation.
jei.cybercultivator.info.atmospheric_con: Atmospheric Condenser: Auto-produces 1 Purified Water Bottle every 30 seconds. Max stock: 32. Auto-injects Purity +20 to incubator below. Hopper compatible.
jei.cybercultivator.info.serum_bottler: Serum Bottler: Processes Synaptic Neural Berry into advanced serums (S-01/S-02/S-03). Hopper compatible (top/side input, bottom output).
jei.cybercultivator.info.silicon_ore: Silicon Ore: Generates underground and drops Raw Silicon Crystal. Silk Touch preserves the ore block.
jei.cybercultivator.info.rare_earth_ore: Rare Earth Ore: Generates underground and drops Raw Rare Earth. Silk Touch preserves the ore block.
jei.cybercultivator.serum_effect.s01: Atk Speed + Strength | Side: Wither + Hunger
jei.cybercultivator.serum_effect.s02: Night Vision + Detect players/mobs | Side: Blindness + Hunger
jei.cybercultivator.tooltip.level_scalin:
Duration = Base × (0.5 + Activity×0.1)
Activity ≥8 starts at II, stackable up to VIII
jei.cybercultivator.tooltip.quality_tags: Material quality inherited from seed genes, affects Activity
jei.cybercultivator.tooltip.serum_chain: Chain: Neural Berry + Additive + Glass Bottle → Serum
jei.cybercultivator.tooltip.mutation_for: Special mutation: %s%% base + %s%% per generation + %s%% per max gene difference
jei.cybercultivator.tooltip.rate_value: Default Speed multiplier: %sx (environment multiplier applies separately)
jei.cybercultivator.tooltip.quality_form: Quality = Potency gene value (affects serum Activity)
jei.cybercultivator.tooltip.serum_stacka: Stackable to increase level, max VIII
jei.cybercultivator.tooltip.serum_side_e: Causes Neural Overload when effect ends
gui.cybercultivator.condenser.auto_toolt: Toggle purity injection into the incubator below
gui.cybercultivator.condenser.pause_tool: Pause or resume purified water production
